articles.author: Valentina Palladino
articles.title: Prime Day deals are officially live: Shop the best tech sales from Apple, Sony, Bose, Anker and others for up to 54% off right now - Yahoo Tech
articles.description: Prime Day deals have discounted a bunch of our favorite tech from headphones to TVs to iPhone accessories and more.
articles.content: Amazon Prime Day has returned, meaning Prime members can save across a swath of items available from the online retailer. The summertime shopping event typically runs for 48-hours, but Amazon extende… [+20371 chars]
